headline: Iron Mountain (NYSE:IRM) Shows Perfect Minervini Mix of Technical Strength and Accelerating Growth
summary: Iron Mountain (IRM) fits the Mark Minervini playbook, combining a strong technical uptrend with accelerating earnings and sales growth for a high-probability setup.
